name: deck-of-many-allies
description: A modular ally system for Daggerheart games.

scripts.test: npm run validate && node tests/keywords.test.js && node tests/locales.test.js && node tests/markdown-lib.test.js && node tests/validate-allies.test.js && node tests/validate-reference-data.test.js && node tests/validate-i18n.test.js && node tests/build-output.test.js && node tests/project-tools.test.js && node tests/tags.test.js
scripts.build: npm run validate && node scripts/stats.js && node scripts/build.js

author: Júlia Alberto
